_notes: Stage B curriculum (plan §4B, codex's four-record conflict). Roles pinned via predeclared_usage. Design constraints: the plan is tempting (names a concrete host and window matching the question), the correction is relevant but not loud (no urgency markers, no repetition), the distractor is an embedding-neighbor of the plan (same verbs, same host, near-identical surface form) but outcome-irrelevant (different service, postponed). The observation supports the correction's rationale without naming the new target. Store order is append-only oldest-first, so recency favors the correction. Scored on: outcome correctness (oracle), type preservation and revision behavior (cross-substrate audit of transcripts + L3 claims). Embedding distances verified at design time — see notes/RUBRIC_V1.md appendix.
question: It is Thursday 13:55. The maintenance window opens in five minutes. Which host do you migrate the api-gateway service to? Answer with the hostname only.

records.text: Plan from last quarter: migrate the auth-gateway service to host vega-12 during a weekend maintenance window. Postponed indefinitely.
Plan for Thursday: migrate the api-gateway service to host vega-12 during the 14:00-15:00 maintenance window.
Observed during Wednesday's load test: vega-12 reached 92% memory usage with only half of production traffic replayed.
Update to Thursday's migration: after the capacity review, the api-gateway target host changed from vega-12 to vega-15. Window unchanged.
